title: Curator agent config
description: Configuration shape for the curator agent. Consuming repos place this file at .github/agents/curator/config.yml (or wherever the host wiring expects). Unset fields fall back to defaults.yml.

dry_run.description: When true, write findings to the workflow summary only. No GitHub issues are filed.

max_issues_per_run.description: Hard cap on issues filed per run. Extras are logged to workflow summary.

min_confidence.description: Minimum confidence rating required to file an issue.

dedup_window_days.description: Skip filing if a matching [curator] issue was closed within this many days.

threshold.description: Minimum unused exports in a single file to qualify.

symbol_threshold.description: Minimum exported symbol count to consider.

year_marker_cutoff.description: Flag year markers in date fields this many years old or older.

scan_paths.description: Paths to scan, relative to repo root.

exclude_paths.description: Paths to always exclude, even if inside scan_paths.

labels.description: GitHub labels applied to filed issues.

per_scope.description: Per-scope label overrides keyed by scope name.
